description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run Mypy that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.8, 3.11). For each combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies including mypy 1.4.0, and run mypy tests with tests/run_mypy.py.
